title: [PC] Dungeon Keeper 1&2 $1.79 Each @ GOG
body:
Deal: [PC] Dungeon Keeper 1&2 $1.79 Each @ GOG

[Jengel] I spent a lot of time in dungeon keeper 1, and after looking back I probably missed about 20-30% of the content. Only dabbled in dungeon keeper 2 but it was also pretty good from memory!
[rhino86] Me too, dungeon keeper 1 was good :) lots of time :)
[starbearer] Burn baby burn, Disco inferno
Jackpot winner!
[rhino86] Choir Boys: Run to Paradise
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3hxYDqhy2Vc&list=RD3hxYDqhy2…
[starbearer] @rhino86: no i mean, the song I posted played in Dungeon Keeper when one of the minions won a jackpot in the casino.
I was asking where did your song play?
[Cheap Gamer] https://www.gog.com/en/games/discounted
8457 games >> Hide DLC >> 5506 games >> $10 limit >> 3397 games >> $5 limit >> 1803 games!!!
[Mums Poop Sock] I put hundreds of hours in as a kid but tried replaying recently and it was just too clunky. These games would do well with a remaster!
[Jimothy Wongingtons] For DK1 look into keeperfx mod if you didn’t already
[Wafflel] A bile demon has become unhappy because he has no food
[tsunamisurfer] DK2 is great because of the Skirmish mode (I have finished all levels).
I have created my own maps with the map editor and made is 4 dungeon keepers all on all, it is great fun until they randomly gang up on you.
It's most satisfying when you 'kill' their army and then take them to your torture chamber to convert them.
